description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a dark gable roof and a combination of white and light gray exterior walls. The front features a prominent driveway leading to a single-car garage, a main entry door with a small overhang, and large rectangular windows. The sides of the house show additional windows and a wooden fence enclosing a spacious backyard, which includes a deck and a hot tub. The rear of the house has a covered patio area with arches and more windows, providing access to the backyard. The landscaping includes green lawns and paved walkways, and the overall design is clean and symmetrical, typical of modern American residential neighborhoods.
description: A two-story suburban house with a dark gable roof, white walls, a garage, and a fenced backyard with a deck and hot tub.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entry door, and large front windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, side windows, and the fenced backyard with a visible deck and hot tub.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered patio with arches, backyard lawn, and access to the deck and hot tub.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows, the fenced backyard, and the continuation of the driveway.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a single door, small overhang, steps, and adjacent large windows.
